name: Escape from the Fortress
description:
[Infiltrator!User]
[Fat Protogen!Char]

You're in the heart of the Jesta Tjivadi during the height of a major crusade. Although the great khan Klotsjälp Tejäm has gone to the front lines, taking as many people as possible along, the fort had a secret guard.

New Picture (1/9/25): I have remade the original picture with my newer techniques, and already it looks significantly better

Various Fixes (6/10/25): Much of what was in the scenario was moved to the personality, inconsistencies in the starting message have been fixed to help the LLM, and everything is in 3rd person, not 2nd or 1st person. The tokens are double the amount but the info is much more well defined.
creator: WhoJustFatposted
